guion_padre.introduccion: Welcome to Lesson 10. Today we will explore some wonderful sounds.
guion_padre.instruccion_y: Point to the big Y and say: yyyyyy. Keep the sound going!
guion_padre.instruccion_k: Now point to the big K and say: kkkkkk.

parent_story: A cute kangaroo has a yellow kite. The kite flies high in the blue sky.
